commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 17:7 Also in the third year of his reign he sent to his leaders, even to Ben-hail, and to Obadiah, and to Zechariah, and to Nethanel, and to Micaiah, to teach in the cities of Judah. Political, (Tirinus) to see that all paid attention to the proper teachers; (Malachi as ii. ; Calmet) and thus to partake in that good work. (Menochius) The princes might also give instruction by word (Calmet) and example.
